title: [Griffin's Keen, Inner Trail]
description: The trail curls up out of the gully, hugging the grey-white mountainside closely.  Shrieking wails sound from all around, but whether they are the tortured cries of intelligent souls or the whistling screech of the wind is unclear.

wayto.4003: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'down'
